content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the provided image and format it into a JSON structure. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a data sheet for a Texas Instruments product, the TPS56x200. It contains: - Header information (ordering, technical docs, design support, TI logo, product numbers, date). - Title of the product. - "1 Features" section with a bulleted list. - "2 Applications" section with a bulleted list. - A schematic diagram labeled "Simplified Schematic". - "3 Description" section with text. - A table labeled "Device Information". - A graph showing efficiency vs output current. - Footer with a notice. **2. Extract content section by section:** * **Header:** * Ordering & quality logo * Technical documentation logo * Design & development logo * Support & training logo * Texas Instruments logo * TPS562200, TPS563200 * SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023 * **Title:** * TPS56x200 4.5-V to 17-V Input, 2-A, 3-A Synchronous Step-down Voltage Regulator in 6-Pin SOT-23 * **1 Features:** * TPS562200 - 2-A converter with integrated 122-mΩ and 72-mΩ FETs * TPS563200 - 3-A converter with integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs * D-CAP2™ control topology for fast transient response * Input voltage range: 4.5 V to 17 V * Output voltage range: 0.76 V to 7 V * Switching frequency: 650 kHz * Advanced Eco-mode pulse-skip * Low shutdown current less than 10 µA * 1% feedback voltage accuracy (25°C) * Start-up from pre-biased output voltage * Cycle-by-cycle overcurrent limit * Hiccup-mode undervoltage protection * Non-latch OVP, UVLO and TSD protections * Fixed soft start: 1 ms * Use TPS563252 for improved efficiency and higher frequency in a smaller package * Create a Custom Design with WEBENCH® Tools * **2 Applications:** * Digital TV power supply * High definition Blu-ray Disc™ players * Networking home terminal * Digital Set Top Box (STB) * **Schematic:** * Diagram of the circuit. * Copyright © 2016, Texas Instruments Incorporated * Simplified Schematic * **3 Description:** * The TPS562200 and TPS563200 are simple, easy-to-use, 2-A and 3-A synchronous step-down (buck) converters in 6-pin SOT-23 package. * The devices are optimized to operate with minimum external component counts and also optimized to achieve low standby current. * These switch mode power supply (SMPS) devices employ D-CAP2 control topology providing a fast transient response and supporting both low equivalent series resistance (ESR) output capacitors such as specialty polymer and ultra-low ESR ceramic capacitors with no external compensation components. * TPS562200 and TPS563200 operate in Advanced Eco-mode, which maintains high efficiency during light load operation. The devices are available in a 6-pin 1.6-mm × 2.9-mm SOT (DDC) package, and specified from –40°C to 85°C of ambient temperature. * **Device Information table:** * Headers: PART NUMBER, Output Current (Max), Package * Row 1: TPS562200, 2 A, DRL (SOT-236, 6) * Row 2: TPS563200, 3 A, (merged cell for package) * **Graph:** * Note: (1) For all available packages, see the orderable addendum at the end of the data sheet. * Y-axis: Efficiency (%) * X-axis: IOUT - Output Current (A) * Curves for different VOUT values (3.3 V, 5 V, 1.8 V). * Title: Tps562200 Efficiency * **Footer:** * An IMPORTANT NOTICE at the end of this data sheet addresses availability, warranty, changes, use in safety-critical applications, intellectual property matters and other important disclaimers. PRODUCTION DATA. **3. Format as JSON:** Construct the JSON object with the extracted data. ```json [{"bbox": [232, 7, 346, 35], "category": "header", "text": "Ordering & quality"}, {"bbox": [367, 9, 496, 37], "category": "header", "text": "Technical documentation"}, {"bbox": [515, 7, 640, 35], "category": "header", "text": "Design & development"}, {"bbox": [659, 7, 766, 35], "category": "header", "text": "Support & training"}, {"bbox": [85, 55, 248, 88], "category": "header", "text": "TEXAS INSTRUMENTS"}, {"bbox": [744, 64, 912, 77], "category": "header", "text": "TPS562200, TPS563200"}, {"bbox": [637, 77, 912, 89], "category": "header", "text": "SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023"}, {"bbox": [88, 94, 910, 137], "category": "title", "text": "TPS56x200 4.5-V to 17-V Input, 2-A, 3-A Synchronous Step-down Voltage Regulator in 6-Pin SOT-23"}, {"bbox": [89, 158, 193, 175], "category": "title", "text": "1 Features"}, {"bbox": [89, 181, 429, 212], "category": "text", "text": "• TPS562200 - 2-A converter with integrated 122-mΩ and 72-mΩ FETs"}, {"bbox": [89, 212, 482, 241], "category": "text", "text": "• TPS563200 - 3-A converter with integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs"}, {"bbox": [89, 243, 433, 272], "category": "text", "text": "• D-CAP2™ control topology for fast transient response"}, {"bbox": [89, 273, 364, 288], "category": "text", "text": "• Input voltage range: 4.5 V to 17 V"}, {"bbox": [89, 289, 376, 303], "category": "text", "text": "• Output voltage range: 0.76 V to 7 V"}, {"bbox": [89, 304, 336, 318], "category": "text", "text": "• Switching frequency: 650 kHz"}, {"bbox": [89, 319, 349, 333], "category": "text", "text": "• Advanced Eco-mode pulse-skip"}, {"bbox": [89, 334, 396, 348], "category": "text", "text": "• Low shutdown current less than $10 \\mu A$"}, {"bbox": [89, 349, 393, 364], "category": "text", "text": "• 1% feedback voltage accuracy (25°C)"}, {"bbox": [89, 364, 402, 379], "category": "text", "text": "• Start-up from pre-biased output The devices are available in a 6-pin 1.6-mm × 2.9-mm SOT (DDC) package, and specified from $-40^{\\circ}C$ to $85^{\\circ}C$ of ambient temperature."}, {"bbox": [626, 485, 794, 500], "category": "table_caption", "text": "Device Information$^{(1)}$"}, {"bbox": [512, 500, 906, 566], "category": "table", "text": "

PRODUCTION DATA."}] ```
